primary_text:
What if every routine vet cost was just one monthly fee?

That is Best for Pet. $50/month per pet.

Unlimited vet consults. All vaccinations and boosters. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 virtual vet access through VetChat.

No claims to file. No excess. Not insurance. A wellness plan at your local vet that covers preventative care.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: One fee. Every routine vet cost. Sorted.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Your local vet.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
creative_brief: Minimal, clean. One checkmark per inclusion. White space. Feels simple, not salesy.
